[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 101110001 5
2 101111010 6
3 101101110 6
4 010011111 6
5 011011001 5
6 111101111 8
7 111111110 8
